---
pagetitle: "DigiKat — Prikaz i analiza katoličke tematike u digitalnom medijskom prostoru"
page-layout: custom
toc: false
---

```{=html}
<div style="font-family: 'Source Sans 3', system-ui, sans-serif; color: #1b1d21; line-height: 1.55;">

<!-- ============ HERO ============ -->
<section style="border-bottom: 1px solid #e4e2da;">
  <div style="max-width: 1180px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 72px 40px 64px;">
    <div style="display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-size: 12px; letter-spacing: .14em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #0f4c5c; margin-bottom: 26px;">
      <span style="width: 7px; height: 7px; background: #0f4c5c; border-radius: 50%;"></span>
      Računalna društvena znanost · 2021.–2026.
    </div>
    <h1 style="font-family: 'Source Serif 4', serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 52px; line-height: 1.08; letter-spacing: -0.015em; margin: 0; max-width: 19ch; color: #14181d; text-wrap: balance;">
      Prikaz i analiza katoličke tematike u digitalnom medijskom prostoru
    </h1>
    <p style="font-size: 20px; line-height: 1.5; color: #4f535a; margin: 22px 0 0; max-width: 60ch;">
      Ovo je projekt Hrvatskog katoličkog sveučilišta mapiranja katoličke tematike u hrvatskom digitalnom medijskom prostoru. Projekt predstavlja empirijsko istraživanje otvorene znanosti o tome kako se o religiji raspravlja na internetu, kroz portale, društvene platforme i forume.
    </p>
    <div style="display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 14px; margin-top: 38px;">
      <a href="baza.html" style="display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; background: #0f4c5c; color: #fff; text-decoration: none; font-weight: 600; font-size: 15px; padding: 12px 22px; border-radius: 6px;">Istraži podatke</a>
      <a href="mapa/mapa.html" style="display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; background: transparent; color: #14181d; text-decoration: none; font-weight: 600; font-size: 15px; padding: 12px 22px; border-radius: 6px; border: 1px solid #cfccc2;">Mapa medijskog prostora</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ============ STATS BAND ============ -->
<section style="border-bottom: 1px solid #e4e2da;">
  <div style="max-width: 1180px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 52px 40px;">
    <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(6, 1fr); gap: 0; align-items: start;">
      <div style="padding: 4px 28px 4px 0; border-right: 1px solid #e4e2da;">
        <div style="font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-weight: 600; font-size: 36px; line-height: 1; letter-spacing: -0.02em; color: #14181d;">710.000</div>
        <div style="font-size: 13px; color: #6b6f76; margin-top: 8px; line-height: 1.4;">medijskih objava</div>
      </div>
      <div style="padding: 4px 28px; border-right: 1px solid #e4e2da;">
        <div style="font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-weight: 600; font-size: 36px; line-height: 1; letter-spacing: -0.02em; color: #14181d;">47</div>
        <div style="font-size: 13px; color: #6b6f76; margin-top: 8px; line-height: 1.4;">kodiranih varijabli</div>
      </div>
      <div style="padding: 4px 28px; border-right: 1px solid #e4e2da;">
        <div style="font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-weight: 600; font-size: 36px; line-height: 1; letter-spacing: -0.02em; color: #14181d;">6</div>
        <div style="font-size: 13px; color: #6b6f76; margin-top: 8px; line-height: 1.4;">godina · 2021.–2026.</div>
      </div>
      <div style="padding: 4px 28px; border-right: 1px solid #e4e2da;">
        <div style="font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-weight: 600; font-size: 36px; line-height: 1; letter-spacing: -0.02em; color: #14181d;">9</div>
        <div style="font-size: 13px; color: #6b6f76; margin-top: 8px; line-height: 1.4;">platformi i izvora</div>
      </div>
      <div style="padding: 4px 28px; border-right: 1px solid #e4e2da;">
        <div style="font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-weight: 600; font-size: 36px; line-height: 1; letter-spacing: -0.02em; color: #14181d;">16</div>
        <div style="font-size: 13px; color: #6b6f76; margin-top: 8px; line-height: 1.4;">tematskih kategorija</div>
      </div>
      <div style="padding: 4px 0 4px 28px;">
        <div style="font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-weight: 600; font-size: 36px; line-height: 1; letter-spacing: -0.02em; color: #14181d;">4</div>
        <div style="font-size: 13px; color: #6b6f76; margin-top: 8px; line-height: 1.4;">analitičke razine</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div style="display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 8px; margin-top: 28px; padding-top: 24px; border-top: 1px solid #e4e2da; font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-size: 11.5px; color: #4f535a;">
      <span style="background: #f2f0ea; border-radius: 4px; padding: 4px 10px;">Web portali</span>
      <span style="background: #f2f0ea; border-radius: 4px; padding: 4px 10px;">YouTube</span>
      <span style="background: #f2f0ea; border-radius: 4px; padding: 4px 10px;">Facebook</span>
      <span style="background: #f2f0ea; border-radius: 4px; padding: 4px 10px;">Twitter / X</span>
      <span style="background: #f2f0ea; border-radius: 4px; padding: 4px 10px;">Reddit</span>
      <span style="background: #f2f0ea; border-radius: 4px; padding: 4px 10px;">Forumi</span>
      <span style="background: #f2f0ea; border-radius: 4px; padding: 4px 10px;">Instagram</span>
      <span style="background: #f2f0ea; border-radius: 4px; padding: 4px 10px;">Komentari</span>
      <span style="background: #f2f0ea; border-radius: 4px; padding: 4px 10px;">TikTok</span>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ============ FRAMEWORK ============ -->
<section style="border-bottom: 1px solid #e4e2da;">
  <div style="max-width: 1180px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 80px 40px;">
    <div style="display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-size: 12px; letter-spacing: .14em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #0f4c5c; margin-bottom: 12px;"><span style="width: 18px; height: 1px; background: #0f4c5c;"></span> 01 — Analitički okvir</div>
    <h2 style="font-family: 'Source Serif 4', serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 32px; line-height: 1.12; margin: 0 0 8px; color: #14181d;">Od medijske objave do analize</h2>
    <p style="color: #5a5e65; max-width: 64ch; margin: 0 0 44px;">Podaci se prikupljaju, filtriraju u korpus, objedinjuju u glavni skup podataka, obrađuju i naposljetku čitaju kroz četiri analitičke razine; svaki korak gradi na sljedećem.</p>
    <details open>
    <summary style="cursor: pointer; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-size: 13px; color: #0f4c5c; font-weight: 600; list-style: none; margin-bottom: 28px;">Prikaži korake <span style="font-size: 12px; color: #8a8e95;">(5)</span></summary>
    <div style="position: relative; padding-left: 56px;">
      <div style="position: absolute; left: 19px; top: 22px; bottom: 22px; width: 2px; background: linear-gradient(#0f4c5c, #cfddE1);"></div>
      <div style="position: relative; display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr auto; gap: 24px; align-items: start; background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e4e2da; border-radius: 10px; padding: 24px 26px; margin-bottom: 18px;">
        <div style="position: absolute; left: -56px; top: 22px; width: 40px; height: 40px; border-radius: 50%; background: #0f4c5c; color: #fff; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-weight: 600; font-size: 15px;">01</div>
        <div><h3 style="font-family: 'Source Serif 4', serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 21px; margin: 0 0 3px; color: #14181d;">Prikupljanje</h3><p style="margin: 0; color: #4f535a; font-size: 15px; max-width: 62ch;">Medijske objave s portala, društvenih platformi i foruma pristižu kao tablice — svaki redak jedna objava, s tekstom, izvorom, datumom i pokazateljima dosega i angažmana.</p></div>
        <div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px; font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-size: 11.5px;"><span style="background: #eaf0f2; color: #2c5663; padding: 4px 9px; border-radius: 4px;">xlsx</span><span style="background: #eaf0f2; color: #2c5663; padding: 4px 9px; border-radius: 4px;">ingest</span></div>
      </div>
      <div style="position: relative; display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr auto; gap: 24px; align-items: start; background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e4e2da; border-radius: 10px; padding: 24px 26px; margin-bottom: 18px;">
        <div style="position: absolute; left: -56px; top: 22px; width: 40px; height: 40px; border-radius: 50%; background: #1a5b6b; color: #fff; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-weight: 600; font-size: 15px;">02</div>
        <div><h3 style="font-family: 'Source Serif 4', serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 21px; margin: 0 0 3px; color: #14181d;">Filtriranje</h3><p style="margin: 0; color: #4f535a; font-size: 15px; max-width: 62ch;">Objava ulazi u korpus samo ako sadrži najmanje dva različita podudaranja s popisom katoličkih i religijskih pojmova — ovo pravilo definira opseg korpusa.</p></div>
        <div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px; font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-size: 11.5px;"><span style="background: #eaf0f2; color: #2c5663; padding: 4px 9px; border-radius: 4px;">regex</span><span style="background: #eaf0f2; color: #2c5663; padding: 4px 9px; border-radius: 4px;">≥2 matches</span></div>
      </div>
      <div style="position: relative; display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr auto; gap: 24px; align-items: start; background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e4e2da; border-radius: 10px; padding: 24px 26px; margin-bottom: 18px;">
        <div style="position: absolute; left: -56px; top: 22px; width: 40px; height: 40px; border-radius: 50%; background: #2c6f7e; color: #fff; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-weight: 600; font-size: 15px;">03</div>
        <div><h3 style="font-family: 'Source Serif 4', serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 21px; margin: 0 0 3px; color: #14181d;">Korpus</h3><p style="margin: 0; color: #4f535a; font-size: 15px; max-width: 62ch;">Objave koje prođu filtar deduplicirane su i objedinjene u glavni skup podataka — oko 710.000 objava, koje čine jedinstveni izvor za sve analize.</p></div>
        <div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px; font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-size: 11.5px;"><span style="background: #eaf0f2; color: #2c5663; padding: 4px 9px; border-radius: 4px;">dedupe</span><span style="background: #eaf0f2; color: #2c5663; padding: 4px 9px; border-radius: 4px;">master</span></div>
      </div>
      <div style="position: relative; display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr auto; gap: 24px; align-items: start; background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e4e2da; border-radius: 10px; padding: 24px 26px; margin-bottom: 18px;">
        <div style="position: absolute; left: -56px; top: 22px; width: 40px; height: 40px; border-radius: 50%; background: #3f8694; color: #fff; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-weight: 600; font-size: 15px;">04</div>
        <div><h3 style="font-family: 'Source Serif 4', serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 21px; margin: 0 0 3px; color: #14181d;">Obrada</h3><p style="margin: 0; color: #4f535a; font-size: 15px; max-width: 62ch;">Iz glavnog skupa izračunavaju se agregati po godini i platformi, a tekst se jezično obrađuje (tokenizacija i lematizacija) kako bi bio spreman za analizu.</p></div>
        <div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px; font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-size: 11.5px;"><span style="background: #eaf0f2; color: #2c5663; padding: 4px 9px; border-radius: 4px;">aggregate</span><span style="background: #eaf0f2; color: #2c5663; padding: 4px 9px; border-radius: 4px;">udpipe</span></div>
      </div>
      <div style="position: relative; display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr auto; gap: 24px; align-items: start; background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e4e2da; border-radius: 10px; padding: 24px 26px;">
        <div style="position: absolute; left: -56px; top: 22px; width: 40px; height: 40px; border-radius: 50%; background: #5a949f; color: #fff; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-weight: 600; font-size: 15px;">05</div>
        <div><h3 style="font-family: 'Source Serif 4', serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 21px; margin: 0 0 3px; color: #14181d;">Analiza</h3><p style="margin: 0; color: #4f535a; font-size: 15px; max-width: 62ch;">Korpus se čita kroz četiri analitičke razine: mapa ekosustava (doseg i angažman), tematske struje (16 kategorija), atmosfera diskursa (tonalitet i emocije) te fokus na događaje.</p></div>
        <div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px; font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-size: 11.5px;"><span style="background: #eaf0f2; color: #2c5663; padding: 4px 9px; border-radius: 4px;">ecosystem</span><span style="background: #eaf0f2; color: #2c5663; padding: 4px 9px; border-radius: 4px;">themes</span><span style="background: #eaf0f2; color: #2c5663; padding: 4px 9px; border-radius: 4px;">sentiment</span><span style="background: #eaf0f2; color: #2c5663; padding: 4px 9px; border-radius: 4px;">events</span></div>
      </div>
    </div>
    </details>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ============ ISTRAŽIVAČKA PITANJA ============ -->
<section style="border-bottom: 1px solid #e4e2da;">
  <div style="max-width: 1180px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 80px 40px;">
    <div style="display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-size: 12px; letter-spacing: .14em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #0f4c5c; margin-bottom: 12px;"><span style="width: 18px; height: 1px; background: #0f4c5c;"></span> 02 — Istraživačka pitanja</div>
    <h2 style="font-family: 'Source Serif 4', serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 32px; line-height: 1.12; margin: 0 0 32px; color: #14181d;">Istraživačka pitanja</h2>
    <div style="background: #fff; border: 1px solid #0f4c5c; border-radius: 10px; padding: 28px 30px; display: flex; gap: 18px; margin-bottom: 18px;">
      <div style="font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-weight: 600; font-size: 13px; color: #0f4c5c; padding-top: 3px; flex: none;">Q1</div>
      <p style="margin: 0; font-size: 17px; color: #14181d; line-height: 1.5; font-weight: 500;">Kako se katolička tematika prikazuje i kako se o njoj raspravlja u digitalnom medijskom prostoru?</p>
    </div>
    <details>
      <summary style="cursor: pointer; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-size: 13px; color: #0f4c5c; font-weight: 600; list-style: none; margin-bottom: 18px;">Ostala istraživačka pitanja <span style="font-size: 12px; color: #8a8e95;">(4)</span></summary>
      <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); gap: 18px; margin-top: 18px;">
        <div style="background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e4e2da; border-radius: 10px; padding: 24px 26px; display: flex; gap: 18px;"><div style="font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-weight: 600; font-size: 13px; color: #0f4c5c; padding-top: 3px;">Q2</div><p style="margin: 0; font-size: 15px; color: #2c3036; line-height: 1.5;">Kakve su veze između katoličkih tema i drugih društvenih i političkih pitanja?</p></div>
        <div style="background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e4e2da; border-radius: 10px; padding: 24px 26px; display: flex; gap: 18px;"><div style="font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-weight: 600; font-size: 13px; color: #0f4c5c; padding-top: 3px;">Q3</div><p style="margin: 0; font-size: 15px; color: #2c3036; line-height: 1.5;">Koji su akteri i institucije najistaknutiji u tim raspravama?</p></div>
        <div style="background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e4e2da; border-radius: 10px; padding: 24px 26px; display: flex; gap: 18px;"><div style="font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-weight: 600; font-size: 13px; color: #0f4c5c; padding-top: 3px;">Q4</div><p style="margin: 0; font-size: 15px; color: #2c3036; line-height: 1.5;">Kako se narativi i sentiment mijenjaju ovisno o aktualnim događajima?</p></div>
        <div style="background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e4e2da; border-radius: 10px; padding: 24px 26px; display: flex; gap: 18px;"><div style="font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-weight: 600; font-size: 13px; color: #0f4c5c; padding-top: 3px;">Q5</div><p style="margin: 0; font-size: 15px; color: #2c3036; line-height: 1.5;">Kakva je mrežna dinamika između različitih platformi i medija koji obrađuju ove teme?</p></div>
      </div>
    </details>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ============ TEAM ============ -->
<section style="border-bottom: 1px solid #e4e2da;">
  <div style="max-width: 1180px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 80px 40px;">
    <div style="display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-size: 12px; letter-spacing: .14em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #0f4c5c; margin-bottom: 12px;"><span style="width: 18px; height: 1px; background: #0f4c5c;"></span> 03 — Tim</div>
    <h2 style="font-family: 'Source Serif 4', serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 32px; line-height: 1.12; margin: 0 0 36px; color: #14181d;">Istraživački tim</h2>
    <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap: 18px;">
      <div style="background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e4e2da; border-radius: 10px; padding: 22px; display: flex; gap: 16px; align-items: center;"><div style="width: 56px; height: 56px; border-radius: 50%; background: #eaf0f2; color: #0f4c5c; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-family: 'Source Serif 4', serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 18px; flex: none;">LŠ</div><div><div style="font-weight: 600; font-size: 16px; color: #14181d;">doc. dr. sc. Luka Šikić</div><div style="font-size: 13px; color: #4f535a; margin-top: 1px;">Voditelj projekta</div><div style="font-size: 12.5px; color: #8a8e95;">HKS · Komunikologija</div></div></div>
    </div>
    <details style="margin-top: 18px;">
      <summary style="cursor: pointer; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-size: 13px; color: #0f4c5c; font-weight: 600; list-style: none;">Prikaži cijeli tim <span style="font-size: 12px; color: #8a8e95;">(9)</span></summary>
      <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap: 18px; margin-top: 18px;">
        <div style="background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e4e2da; border-radius: 10px; padding: 22px; display: flex; gap: 16px; align-items: center;"><div style="width: 56px; height: 56px; border-radius: 50%; background: #eaf0f2; color: #0f4c5c; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-family: 'Source Serif 4', serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 18px; flex: none;">AS</div><div><div style="font-weight: 600; font-size: 16px; color: #14181d;">izv. prof. dr. sc. Andreja Sršen</div><div style="font-size: 13px; color: #4f535a; margin-top: 1px;">Suradnica</div><div style="font-size: 12.5px; color: #8a8e95;">FHS · Sociologija</div></div></div>
        <div style="background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e4e2da; border-radius: 10px; padding: 22px; display: flex; gap: 16px; align-items: center;"><div style="width: 56px; height: 56px; border-radius: 50%; background: #eaf0f2; color: #0f4c5c; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-family: 'Source Serif 4', serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 18px; flex: none;">IP</div><div><div style="font-weight: 600; font-size: 16px; color: #14181d;">izv. prof. dr. sc. Irena Palić</div><div style="font-size: 13px; color: #4f535a; margin-top: 1px;">Suradnica</div><div style="font-size: 12.5px; color: #8a8e95;">EFZG · Statistika</div></div></div>
        <div style="background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e4e2da; border-radius: 10px; padding: 22px; display: flex; gap: 16px; align-items: center;"><div style="width: 56px; height: 56px; border-radius: 50%; background: #eaf0f2; color: #0f4c5c; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-family: 'Source Serif 4', serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 18px; flex: none;">LC</div><div><div style="font-weight: 600; font-size: 16px; color: #14181d;">izv. prof. dr. sc. Lana Ciboci Perša</div><div style="font-size: 13px; color: #4f535a; margin-top: 1px;">Suradnica</div><div style="font-size: 12.5px; color: #8a8e95;">HKS · Komunikologija</div></div></div>
        <div style="background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e4e2da; border-radius: 10px; padding: 22px; display: flex; gap: 16px; align-items: center;"><div style="width: 56px; height: 56px; border-radius: 50%; background: #eaf0f2; color: #0f4c5c; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-family: 'Source Serif 4', serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 18px; flex: none;">PP</div><div><div style="font-weight: 600; font-size: 16px; color: #14181d;">izv. prof. dr. sc. Petra Palić</div><div style="font-size: 13px; color: #4f535a; margin-top: 1px;">Suradnica</div><div style="font-size: 12.5px; color: #8a8e95;">HKS · Sociologija</div></div></div>
        <div style="background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e4e2da; border-radius: 10px; padding: 22px; display: flex; gap: 16px; align-items: center;"><div style="width: 56px; height: 56px; border-radius: 50%; background: #eaf0f2; color: #0f4c5c; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-family: 'Source Serif 4', serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 18px; flex: none;">IU</div><div><div style="font-weight: 600; font-size: 16px; color: #14181d;">doc. dr. sc. Ivan Uldrijan</div><div style="font-size: 13px; color: #4f535a; margin-top: 1px;">Suradnik</div><div style="font-size: 12.5px; color: #8a8e95;">HKS · Komunikologija</div></div></div>
        <div style="background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e4e2da; border-radius: 10px; padding: 22px; display: flex; gap: 16px; align-items: center;"><div style="width: 56px; height: 56px; border-radius: 50%; background: #eaf0f2; color: #0f4c5c; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-family: 'Source Serif 4', serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 18px; flex: none;">SL</div><div><div style="font-weight: 600; font-size: 16px; color: #14181d;">dr. sc. Suzana Lipar Obrovac</div><div style="font-size: 13px; color: #4f535a; margin-top: 1px;">Suradnica</div><div style="font-size: 12.5px; color: #8a8e95;">HKS · Odnosi s javnošću</div></div></div>
        <div style="background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e4e2da; border-radius: 10px; padding: 22px; display: flex; gap: 16px; align-items: center;"><div style="width: 56px; height: 56px; border-radius: 50%; background: #eaf0f2; color: #0f4c5c; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-family: 'Source Serif 4', serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 18px; flex: none;">HK</div><div><div style="font-weight: 600; font-size: 16px; color: #14181d;">Hana Kilijan</div><div style="font-size: 13px; color: #4f535a; margin-top: 1px;">Suradnica</div><div style="font-size: 12.5px; color: #8a8e95;">HKS · Komunikologija</div></div></div>
        <div style="background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e4e2da; border-radius: 10px; padding: 22px; display: flex; gap: 16px; align-items: center;"><div style="width: 56px; height: 56px; border-radius: 50%; background: #eaf0f2; color: #0f4c5c; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-family: 'Source Serif 4', serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 18px; flex: none;">VN</div><div><div style="font-weight: 600; font-size: 16px; color: #14181d;">Veronika Novoselec</div><div style="font-size: 13px; color: #4f535a; margin-top: 1px;">Suradnica</div><div style="font-size: 12.5px; color: #8a8e95;">HKS · Povijest</div></div></div>
        <div style="background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e4e2da; border-radius: 10px; padding: 22px; display: flex; gap: 16px; align-items: center;"><div style="width: 56px; height: 56px; border-radius: 50%; background: #eaf0f2; color: #0f4c5c; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-family: 'Source Serif 4', serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 18px; flex: none;">MT</div><div><div style="font-weight: 600; font-size: 16px; color: #14181d;">Matea Topić Crnoja</div><div style="font-size: 13px; color: #4f535a; margin-top: 1px;">Suradnica</div><div style="font-size: 12.5px; color: #8a8e95;">HKS · Sociologija</div></div></div>
      </div>
    </details>
  </div>
</section>

</div>
```
